must_distinguish.note: 早晨 = early morning (everyday, colloquial); 清晨 = early morning (literary, poetic register)

cedict_en: early period; early phase; early stage
dataset_meanings: early period; early phase; early stage

must_distinguish.note: 早期 = relatively early stage (not necessarily the very beginning); 初期 = initial/opening stage (the very start); 初 = the beginning point itself; 阶段 = one phase in a development sequence; 时期 = a broader era or epoch
明亮 = physically bright, well-lit (describes a room, light source); 明 = bright/clear in a broader sense, including clarity of understanding (明白) and as a literary adjective.
景象 = visual scene/panoramic sight (objective); 情景 = scene charged with emotion (atmosphere of a moment); 场面 = visible occasion/spectacle (scale, social impression)
晴天 = noun phrase 'sunny/clear day'; 晴朗 = adjective 'sunny and cloudless' (describes weather or sky). 晴天 is a time noun; 晴朗 is a predicative/attributive adjective.
暑假 = summer vacation (fixed school/academic holiday); 休假 = taking personal leave or a holiday (worker context, voluntary, any time of year).

cedict_en: old variant of 暖[nuan3]/warm/to warm/variant of 暖[nuan3]/variant of 暖[nuan3], warm

must_distinguish.note: 暖 = warm (basic adjective/verb for temperature); 温暖 = warm (richer; also figurative emotional warmth)

cedict_en: to replace (a worn-out tire etc)/to change (one's address etc)

must_distinguish.note: 更换 = swap out (formal, objects); 替 = do something in place of someone; 替代 = substitute (abstract/systemic); 代替 = replace/act for (general); 换 = exchange or switch; 代 = act for + era/generation (multi-sense morpheme)

cedict_en: to substitute for/to take the place of/to replace/for/on behalf of/to stand in for

must_distinguish.note: 更换 = swap out (formal, objects); 替 = do something in place of someone; 替代 = substitute (abstract/systemic); 代替 = replace/act for (general); 换 = exchange or switch; 代 = act for + era/generation (multi-sense morpheme)

更换 = swap out (formal, objects); 替 = do something in place of someone; 替代 = substitute (abstract/systemic); 代替 = replace/act for (general); 换 = exchange or switch; 代 = act for + era/generation (multi-sense morpheme)
月亮 = the moon (everyday, poetic, emotional — moonlight poetry); 月球 = the Moon as a celestial/scientific body (technical: lunar missions, astronomy).
有的 = some (of a defined set, distributive: 有的人…有的人…); 有一些 = there are some (existential quantity); 有些 (5k) = some/somewhat (also degree adverb before adjectives)
有点儿/有点 lean negative/complaint; 有一点儿 is neutral-emphatic; 稍微 is neutral and milder; 略微 is formal/literary

cedict_en: to be advantageous to; to be beneficial for
dataset_meanings: to be advantageous to; to be beneficial for

must_distinguish.note: 体力 = physical stamina/endurance; 力气 = brute physical effort (colloquial); 力量 = strength/force (abstract or collective); 有力 = forceful/powerful (attributive adjective)
有力 = forceful, effective (of arguments, measures, evidence); 强 = strong/powerful in general; 强大 = powerful and formidable (of entities, nations, forces)
坏处 = noun: a downside/drawback; 有害 = adjective: harmful/damaging; 危害 = verb/noun: endanger, pose a threat (systemic); 伤害 = verb: to hurt/injure (person, feelings)
毒 = poison/venom (noun/morpheme); 有毒 = poisonous/toxic (predicate adjective); 毒品 = narcotics/illegal drugs (law register)
有点儿/有点 lean negative/complaint; 有一点儿 is neutral-emphatic; 稍微 is neutral and milder; 略微 is formal/literary
有的 = some (of a defined set, distributive: 有的人…有的人…); 有一些 = there are some (existential quantity); 有些 (5k) = some/somewhat (also degree adverb before adjectives)

带有 = carry (a slight quality/tinge — partial, incidental); 有着 = have/possess (literary, emphatic state); 拥有 = own/possess (ongoing state, valuables, rights); 占有 = possess/occupy (with control, sometimes forcibly)

cedict_en: book/notebook/Japanese-style self-published comic (esp. an erotic one), aka "dōjinshi"/CL:本[ben3]/edition
dataset_meanings: Japanese-style self-published comic (esp. an erotic one), aka "dōjinshi"

must_distinguish.note: 笔记 = notes (the written content of what one records); 本子 = notebook (the physical object); learners confuse them when translating 'take notes in a notebook'

cedict_en: to disinfect/(computing) to destroy a computer virus
surname Song/pine/CL:棵[ke1]/loose/to loosen/to relax/floss (dry, fluffy food product made from shredded, seasoned meat or fish, used as a topping or filling)
dataset_meanings: floss (dry, fluffy food product made from shredded, seasoned meat or fish, used as a topping or filling)

must_distinguish.note: 松 = loose/slack (state adjective, or verb: loosen); 放松 = relax/let go (deliberate action, often mental relaxation).
极了 is a post-adjective suffix (好极了); 极 is the free adverb (pre-adj, neutral); 极其 is formal/written; 万分 is used only with emotional adjectives.
结构 = abstract/analytical structure or composition; 构造 = concrete physical construction or build (geology, machinery). 构造 implies how something is assembled; 结构 how it is organized.

cedict_en: to check/to inquire/to consult (a document etc)/inquiry/query

must_distinguish.note: 查询 = query facts/data/records (look something up); 咨询 = consult an expert or service for advice.

cedict_en: Shulin city in New Taipei City 新北市[Xin1 bei3 shi4], Taiwan/woods/grove/forest
dataset_meanings: Shulin city in New Taipei City 市, Taiwan

must_distinguish.note: 树林 = woods/grove (smaller, local stand of trees); 森林 (5k) = forest (large-scale, ecological term).

cedict_en: to dream about (sth or sb)/to see in a dream

must_distinguish.note: 做梦 = have a dream (while sleeping) or daydream (general). 梦见 = dream of sth specific (see it in a dream). 梦想 = cherished aspiration, to dream of (waking goal). 幻想 = fantasy/daydream (unrealistic imagination).

检测 = detect/measure (instrument or sensor); 检验 = inspect/test quality or validity; 检查 = routine check/inspection (medical or compliance); 测验 = classroom quiz or test; 考验 = life/moral ordeal, trial; 化验 = lab assay/analysis; 探测 = probe/detect remotely (instruments, space)

cedict_en: song (CL:首[shou3],支[zhi1])/(bound form) to sing/variant of 歌[ge1]

must_distinguish.note: 歌 is colloquial/informal and can refer to the act of singing or a song; 歌曲 is the standard formal/written term for a musical composition (song as a piece)
歌 is colloquial/informal and can refer to the act of singing or a song; 歌曲 is the standard formal/written term for a musical composition (song as a piece)

此刻 = 'this very moment' (literary/emotional, pinpoints an instant); 眼下 = 'right now' (spoken, informal); 目前 = 'at present' (neutral time adverb, written); 当前 = 'current/pressing now' (formal, implies urgency or importance of the present task).
此后 = formal/written 'from this point onward; hereafter' (often opens a new phase); 之后 = general neutral 'after; afterwards' (everyday use)
Both mean 'now': 今 is literary/formal (used in set phrases 今日, 今年, or classical prose); 此时 = 'at this moment/right now' (narrative temporal marker, more vivid but still written-register)

cedict_en: surname Bu/a step/a pace/walk/march/stages in a process/situation

must_distinguish.note: 步 = a single physical step or pace (also a measure word); 步伐 = gait or collective pace/tempo (figurative: pace of development); 步骤 = procedural step in a sequence (not physical).
毒 = poison/venom (noun/morpheme); 有毒 = poisonous/toxic (predicate adjective); 毒品 = narcotics/illegal drugs (law register)
毕业 = to graduate (the act); 毕业生 = graduate (person who has finished any degree); 研究生 = graduate student (currently enrolled in postgraduate study)
气体 = gas as a physical state (science); 天然气 = natural gas (utility); 煤气 = coal gas / domestic gas (cooking/heating); 柴油 = diesel fuel (vehicles); 燃料 = fuel in general (any type)
气温 = specifically atmospheric/air temperature (weather/meteorology); 温度 = temperature in any context (body, water, oven, etc.)
水灾 = flood disaster (the event/calamity, emphasis on damage); 洪水 = floodwater/deluge (the water itself, also used figuratively).

cedict_en: to remit/to converge (of rivers)/to exchange/class/collection/variant of 匯|汇[hui4]

must_distinguish.note: 汇 = remit money (verb morpheme); 汇款 = remittance as noun or verb phrase (more complete collocation used in transactions)
汇 = remit money (verb morpheme); 汇款 = remittance as noun or verb phrase (more complete collocation used in transactions)

cedict_en: to have spare time/free from work/it's not important/it's nothing/never mind

must_distinguish.note: All dismiss a concern. 没事儿 is colloquial Beijing-dialect (erhua); 没什么 is neutral ('it's nothing / not much'); 不要紧 is polite reassurance ('it doesn't matter'), slightly more formal.

cedict_en: it doesn't matter; it's nothing; never mind/think nothing of it; it's my pleasure; you're welcome

must_distinguish.note: All dismiss a concern. 没事儿 is colloquial Beijing-dialect (erhua); 没什么 is neutral ('it's nothing / not much'); 不要紧 is polite reassurance ('it doesn't matter'), slightly more formal.
泪 is the literary/bare morpheme (poetry, compounds); 泪水 is more expressive/written (emphasizes the physical liquid); 眼泪 is the neutral everyday word for 'tears' (spoken and written).
泪 is the literary/bare morpheme (poetry, compounds); 泪水 is more expressive/written (emphasizes the physical liquid); 眼泪 is the neutral everyday word for 'tears' (spoken and written).

cedict_en: to flow/to disseminate/to circulate or spread/to move or drift/to degenerate/to banish or send into exile/stream of water or sth resembling one/class, rate or grade
dataset_meanings: to banish or send into exile
stream of water or sth resembling one

must_distinguish.note: 流 = flow/stream (simple verb, tears, water, time); 流动 = flow/circulate (systemic ongoing movement — crowds, capital, liquids in systems)

cedict_en: to flow; to circulate; to move about; mobile; (of assets) liquid
dataset_meanings: to go from place to place

must_distinguish.note: 流 = flow/stream (simple verb, tears, water, time); 流动 = flow/circulate (systemic ongoing movement — crowds, capital, liquids in systems)
测 = measure/test (root morpheme, often in compounds); 测量 = measure with instruments (surveying, scientific measurement).
测 = measure/test (general, incl. estimating); 测量 = measure physical dimensions precisely; 调查 = investigate/survey people or facts; 勘探 = prospect/survey terrain for resources

cedict_en: to appreciate (in value)/to increase in price

must_distinguish.note: 涨/上涨/涨价 = prices/levels surge (market connotation); 上升/升 = rise physically or in rank; 升高 = rise in measurable degree (temperature, level); 提高 = raise intentionally (quality, standard)
深 (5k) = physically deep or dark (color); 深厚 = deep and solid (feelings, foundation, skills); 深沉 (5k) = deeply reserved or brooding (personality/mood)
渐渐 = gradually (natural, often imperceptible change); 逐渐 = gradually (more formal, measurable process); 逐步 = step by step (deliberate, planned stages)
游客 = tourist (sightseeing, leisure traveler); 旅客 = traveler/passenger (any traveler, incl. transit)
湿 = wet or moist (something soaked/dampened); 潮湿 = damp/humid (ambient moisture, environment)

cedict_en: to perform (a play etc); to stage (a show)/(bound form) to develop; to play out; to carry out (a task)

must_distinguish.note: 演 = perform broadly (act,演奏 music, lecture); 表演 = perform for an audience (demonstrate a skill or act); 扮演 = play a specific character/role
唱 = sing (everyday, any context); 演唱 = sing in a formal or stage performance (implies an audience)
音乐会 covers any music concert (instrumental or vocal); 演唱会 is specifically a vocal/singing concert or pop/rock live show

cedict_en: tide/damp; moist; humid/fashionable; trendy/(coll.) inferior; substandard

must_distinguish.note: 潮湿 (5k) is the neutral adjective for damp/humid; 潮 alone adds connotations of excessive or unpleasant moisture (also used colloquially for 'trendy')
All relate to 'light'; 光 = light in general or 'only/merely'; 灯 = lamp/fixture; 光线 = ray or quality of (natural) light; 灯光 = artificial lighting or stage light.
灰 = ash; gray (basic adjective, also means ash/dust); 灰色 = gray (color noun compound, more specific to the color itself; also used metaphorically for ambiguity)
